content: Phase 1: Core API layer - Create R/preproc-generics.R with S3 generics
Phase 1: Add lifecycle dependency to DESCRIPTION
Phase 1: Add error handling in R/preproc-utils.R with is_fitted checks
Phase 2: Create compatibility shims with deprecation warnings
Phase 2: Test that old API still works with warnings
Phase 3: Update built-in wrappers in R/svd.R, R/pca.R
Phase 3: Update any other files using prep() + init_transform() pattern
Phase 4: Duplicate existing tests for new API
Phase 4: Add test for transform() without fit() error
Phase 5: Update documentation - new Rd files for generics
Phase 5: Mark old functions with keyword internal
Phase 6: Update vignettes and README to new API
Phase 6: Version bump to 0.3.0 and update NEWS.md
Phase 7: Run comprehensive test suite validation
Phase 7: Setup and run reverse dependency checks
